text_block_list.text:
While walking down the hallway, I hear
high-pitched laughter from the studio, where a
dance lesson is being held...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ohoho! I'm not done yet!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
At the upcoming ball, I'll showcase a first-rate
dance worthy of the name King!
HOLD IT!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: There's no ball like a masquerade, and that means masks! And that means it's El time!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: El?! Where did you come fr—

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Miss King... No, just King! I challenge you to a
battle!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I swear on my Latina blood that my dancing will
put you to shame!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Put me to shame? Why exactly are you
challenging me, I wonder?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
And to a dance battle, no less. I assume that's not
your dancing outfit.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
This is my signature racewear, y'know? The muy
caliente Condor Brawler outfit.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho! Enough with your jesting. Go and clamber
into a ring somewhere.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My time is too precious for such silliness. Now, if
you'll allow me to continue with my lesson.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
"Ladies compete not by combat, but through
dance."

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...Those were the words spoken by a certain
first-rate individual when I had a dance battle
with her.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Is... is that so?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I was dressed like this, and she had nooo problem battling me.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Or should I say, she was secure enough in her
first-rateness that she could accept it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Secure... in her first-rateness?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: But I guess I can't expect you to be that secure, King.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
And I always thought you were first-rate... I'm
disappointed!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: What?! Now, hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Very well, I'll show you just how secure in my
first-rateness I am!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ay! That's the way!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
You there, come judge our battle! And don't
freeze up when it comes time to pick a winner!

Overwhelmed by her sheer intensity, I nod in
agreement before I can help myself

Classical and Latin music starts to play
simultaneously as the dance battle begins.

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Grrr! I won't let you call me a snow monkey again!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what you're alluding to, but... you
just don't back down, do you?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa and King Halo
text_block_list.text:
TAKE THAAAT!
HYAAAH!

The sun sets, but the two show no signs of
stopping. I'm not sure how a battle of waltz and
mambo could come to a natural conclusion in the
first place...
There's only one way to wrap this up!
There's only one way to wrap this up!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Excuse me? What has gotten into you?
choice_data_list: I suddenly got the urge to dance too!
I suddenly got the urge to dance too!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Looks as if my passion has ignited your
dancing spirit!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
...King. I see now that you're worthy of calling
yourself "first-rate."

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
Hmph! B-but of course! I suppose I can
acknowledge that zeal of yours as well.

The blistering dance battle comes to an end with
the two dancers acknowledging each other's
passion for dance.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Damn right! Do you two have any idea what time
it is?!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Gyah! Hishiama!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
While I appreciate your enthusiasm, please do
not cause me undue concern.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Fuji!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text:
My deepest apologies. I'll return to the dorm right
away.

And so the dance battle ends in a draw as the two
dancers wobble back to their respective dorms,
accompanied by their dorm leaders.
